title: EVA unit 1 is EVA unit 8
wikitext:
[]: EVA unit 1 is EVA unit 8 Post by EVAisFTW » Thu Dec 01, 2011 9:14 pm Hey, I think EVA unit 1 is EVA unit 8 because in the 2.0 movie when unit 1 was in the third impact "stage" it had "3 eyes" and if i'm correct unit 8 has "3 eyes" also. So i'm just saying that could be it, and maybe the pilot of unit 8 is Shinji since unit 01 is screwed up. Pictures of prediction: EVA unit 1: http://i1121.photobucket.com/albums/l501/popguy778/eva2-22_jikai_C13.jpg EVA unit 8: http://i1121.photobucket.com/albums/l501/popguy778/vlcsnap-2010-06-02-20h53m50s14-1.png[/img]
